findings.name: web-server-prod
findings.recommendation: Isolate immediately. Patch or apply compensating control within 3 days per BOD 26-04 Section 3(a).

findings.name: api-gateway-node
findings.recommendation: Instance is internet-exposed. Verify patch status immediately. Confirm exposure is intentional and documented in your asset inventory.

findings.name: internal-data-processor
findings.recommendation: CVE detected but no internet path found. Patch per standard maintenance window. Not a BOD 26-04 priority.
